---
title: "Persistent inequalities in PM2.5 Exposure: Santiago (2022-2024)"
subtitle: "Statistical analysis: tables and figures"
date: "2026-01-28"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 2. Descriptive Statistics

The following tables summarize the availability of valid data and average PM2.5 concentrations per municipality.

### 2.1 Annual Statistics

Overview of the entire study period (2022-2024).

```{r}
#| label: tbl-annual
#| echo: false
#| message: false

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

table_annual <- read_rds("../output/tables/table_1_anual.rds")

table_annual %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "comuna") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "",
    subtitle = md("**Table 1:** Annual descriptive statistics of daily PM~2.5~ concentrations by municipality in the Metropolitan Region (2022-2024)")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    comuna = "Municipality",
    anio = "Year",
    N_days = "Valid days",
    'Mean (SD)' = "Mean (SD)",
    Min = "Min",
    Max = "Max",
    P98 = md("P~98~"),
    p_value = "p value" 
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = "anio") %>%
  opt_row_striping(row_striping = FALSE) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.color = "black",
    table.border.top.width = px(3),
    table.border.bottom.color = "black",
    table.border.bottom.width = px(3),
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    row_group.border.bottom.color = "black",
    row_group.border.bottom.width = px(1),
    row_group.font.weight = "bold",
    row_group.background.color = "white",  #No me funciona esto, REVISAR!!!
    table.font.names = "Times New Roman"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md("***Note:** Concentrations are expressed in micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m^3^). **SD:** Standard Deviation. **p~98~:** 98th Percentile of daily means. **Valid days:** Number of days with valid records (≥18 hours). **p value;** Calculated using a one-way ANOVA to assess statistical differences in mean concentrations between years (2022, 2023, 2024) for each municipality.* * *Statiscally significant difference (p<0.05)*")
  )
 
```
